items.title: Notice: Trade remedies notices: tariff-rate quotas on steel goods (expired)
items.summary: Trade remedies notices published by the Secretary of State for Business and Trade relating to the tariff-rate quotas on steel goods (expired).

items.title: Decision: UK's steel trade measure from 1 July 2026
items.summary: Details about a new steel trade measure from 1 July 2026, which limits tariff-free steel import quota volumes.

items.title: UK targets services exports in China trade talks
items.summary: UK targets services exports in China trade talks

items.title: Accredited official statistics: UK local authority and regional greenhouse gas emissions statistics, 2005 to 2024
items.summary: UK local authority and regional estimates of greenhouse gas emissions.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: UK road transport fuel consumption at regional and local authority level, 2005 to 2024
items.summary: Consumption statistics for fuels used in road transport in the UK at regional and local levels from 2005 to 2024.

items.title: Scotland has “high potential” for new nuclear development
items.summary: Technical study on suitable areas in Scotland for new nuclear published.

items.title: Guidance: Horizon Shortfall Scheme Appeals (HSSA): Independent Reviewer terms of reference
items.summary: An Independent Reviewer has been appointed to the Horizon Shortfall Scheme Appeals (HSSA) process to review the Independent Panel's decisions on individual cases.

items.title: Oil and gas: inspection strategy and enforcement activity
items.summary: Yearly intervention plans are produced for oil and gas operations based on the OPRED inspection strategy. Enforcement activities for the breach of environmental regulations is based on the OPRED enforcement policy.

items.title: Guidance: Horizon Shortfall Scheme Appeals (HSSA): Independent Panel terms of reference
items.summary: The Independent Panel terms of reference ensures fair and consistent assessment of claims from postmasters under the HSSA scheme.

items.title: Independent report: Independent Senior Lawyer's review of unevidenced shortfalls process
items.summary: Review and recommendations on the approach taken by Post Office and the Department for Business and Trade (DBT) in handling cases where there is no evidence of a shortfall.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Renewables obligation: certificates and generation - March 2026
items.summary: Monthly data on the number of certificates issued for generation under the Renewables Obligation.

items.title: Official Statistics: Road fuel sales, deliveries and stock levels: 28 June 2026
items.summary: Official statistics in development on average road fuel sales, deliveries and stock levels at sampled filling stations in the United Kingdom from 27 January 2020 to 28 June 2026.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Road fuel prices: 6 July 2026
items.summary: Weekly prices of unleaded petrol and diesel.

items.title: Make Work Pay: holiday pay compliance and enforcement
items.summary: We are seeking views on the proposed approach to holiday pay compliance and enforcement by the Fair Work Agency.

items.title: Research: Potential future nuclear power plant siting in Scotland
items.summary: Technical advice on potential future nuclear power plant siting in Scotland.

items.title: Get Started and Grow scheme Staffordshire
items.summary: Free, expert-led support for Staffordshire businesses under 5 years old.

items.title: Domestic energy price indices
items.summary: Quarterly and monthly consumer price indices of fuel components in current and real terms.

items.title: Annual domestic energy bills
items.summary: Annual estimates of gas and electricity bills, along with statistics on household expenditure on fuel.

items.title: Monthly and annual prices of road fuels and petroleum products
items.summary: Monthly and annual prices of road fuels and fuels used for home heating, plus an index of crude oil prices.

items.title: Quarterly domestic energy switching statistics
items.summary: Quarterly and annual estimates of the total number of switches by electricity and gas customers.

items.title: Prices of fuels purchased by manufacturing industry
items.summary: Quarterly and annual prices of fuels purchased by manufacturing industry, in original units and p/kWh, split into consumption sizebands.

items.title: Prices of fuels purchased by major power producers
items.summary: Quarterly and annual prices of fuels purchased by power generators.

items.title: Industrial energy price indices
items.summary: Quarterly and annual price indices for industrial fuels, in real and current terms, including and excluding the Climate Change Levy (CCL).

items.title: Gas and electricity prices in the non-domestic sector
items.summary: Quarterly and annual gas and electricity prices for the non-domestic sector, including and excluding the Climate Change Levy (CCL), split into consumption size bands.

items.title: Quarterly domestic energy customer numbers
items.summary: Quarterly estimates of the variation in gas and electricity customer numbers by payment type.

items.title: Comparisons of international road fuel prices
items.summary: Comparisons of road fuel prices against other EU countries, using data from the European Commission Oil Bulletin.

items.title: Research: Energy Trends: June 2026, special feature article - Update to estimates of industrial end use consumption within Energy Consumption in the UK (ECUK)
items.summary: Special feature article from the June 2026 edition of Energy Trends statistical publication.

items.title: Research: Energy Trends: June 2026, special feature article - Improvements to electricity supply and consumption statistics (ET 5.2)
items.summary: Special feature article from the June 2026 edition of Energy Trends statistical publication.

items.title: Guidance: UK-China Intellectual Property newsletter
items.summary: At the end of every month we publish a newsletter covering recent intellectual property (IP) developments in China.

items.title: Statutory guidance: Distributing tips fairly: revised statutory code of practice
items.summary: Guidance for employers and workers on the fair and transparent distribution of tips.

items.title: Make Work Pay: strengthening the law on tipping
items.summary: We are seeking views on strengthening the law on tipping.

items.title: Young Enterprise
items.summary: Young Enterprise offers initiatives for all ages from 4 to 25 to help start a business in the UK.

items.title: Growth Guarantee Scheme
items.summary: The Growth Guarantee Scheme is a government-backed scheme designed to support access to finance for UK businesses as they look to invest and grow.

items.title: Notice: Notice to exporters 2026/15: firm named after Russia sanctions breach settlement
items.summary: HM Revenue and Customs (HMRC) names firm after receiving breach settlement related to Russia sanctions.

items.title: Independent report: SME Digital Adoption Taskforce: 2026 update
items.summary: An update on digital adoption work relating to the taskforce and its 10 recommendations to help small businesses adopt digital technologies.

items.title: Sunderland Business Support Fund
items.summary: Grants are available to support projects costing between £3,000 and £6,000 (excluding VAT). The Business Support Fund can cover up to 40% of eligible business spend.

items.title: Equity and Loan fund in Greater Manchester
items.summary: £10m investment fund to support the growth of companies in the advanced manufacturing and materials sector in Greater Manchester.

items.title: Policy paper: CPTPP: joint ministerial statement on energy security and supply chains for essential energy products and other impacted products
items.summary: At the 26 June 2026 ministerial commission meeting, ministers issued a joint statement on disruptions to global energy supply chains caused by the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Policy paper: CPTPP: joint ministerial statement from the 10th commission meeting, 26 June 2026
items.summary: A jointly prepared statement following the virtual ministerial commission meeting of Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific Partnership (CPTPP) members.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Building materials and components statistics: June 2026
items.summary: Provides information on selected building materials and contains monthly data on price indices, bricks, cement and concrete blocks; and quarterly data on sand and gravel, slate, concrete roofing tiles and ready-mixed concrete.
